# `kitty-pointer` sequences

<!-- Generated by `qdb generate reference` from `db/kitty-pointer.toml`. Do not edit by hand. -->

## Set Kitty Pointer Shape (`kitty.pointer.set`)

Shape names follow Kitty's CSS-style pointer shape catalog.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `OSC 22 ; shape ST`
- References: [kitty Pointer Shapes Protocol](https://sw.kovidgoyal.net/kitty/pointer-shapes/) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/kitty/pointer_set.seq`](../../../fixtures/kitty/pointer_set.seq)

## Push Kitty Pointer Shape (`kitty.pointer.push`)

Pushes one shape onto the terminal-maintained pointer stack.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `OSC 22 ; > shape ST`
- References: [kitty Pointer Shapes Protocol](https://sw.kovidgoyal.net/kitty/pointer-shapes/) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/kitty/pointer_push.seq`](../../../fixtures/kitty/pointer_push.seq)

## Pop Kitty Pointer Shape (`kitty.pointer.pop`)

Restores the previous pointer shape from the terminal-maintained stack.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `OSC 22 ; < ST`
- References: [kitty Pointer Shapes Protocol](https://sw.kovidgoyal.net/kitty/pointer-shapes/) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/kitty/pointer_pop.seq`](../../../fixtures/kitty/pointer_pop.seq)

## Query Kitty Pointer Shape (`kitty.pointer.query`)

Fixture queries the `__current__` pseudo-shape.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `OSC 22 ; ? shape ST`
- Responds with: `kitty.pointer.report`
- References: [kitty Pointer Shapes Protocol](https://sw.kovidgoyal.net/kitty/pointer-shapes/) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/kitty/pointer_query.seq`](../../../fixtures/kitty/pointer_query.seq)
- Conformance: alacritty no-reply; betamax no-reply; foot no-reply; kitty supported (8); tmux no-reply; wezterm no-reply; xterm no-reply

## Kitty Pointer Shape Report (`kitty.pointer.report`)

Reports are preserved syntax today; typed event promotion can be added later.

- Direction: terminal-to-host
- References: [kitty Pointer Shapes Protocol](https://sw.kovidgoyal.net/kitty/pointer-shapes/) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/kitty/kitty_pointer_report_report_capture_kitty.seq`](../../../fixtures/kitty/kitty_pointer_report_report_capture_kitty.seq)
